original: the
The sydian rolls aside in a remarkable display of agility for one with such a large frame.
This alien spends so much time moving and lashing her brushed tail that it’s difficult to see details. She’s within inches of five feet, and her untidy
Segmented armor plates cover her whole body except her face and scalp. Incredibly flexible, she drops to all fours when the terrain is too uneven, always moving, always watching you.
Segmented insectoid armor covers her, though major cracks are visible on her chest and stomach. She crouches and crawls often, trying to protect these areas as she circles you.

Segmented chitin armor covers some of her, but the ‘plates’ from her throat down to her groin have collapsed under your attacks, revealing soft skin underneath. She’s moving far more evasively than when the fight began.
Your superior reflexes allow you to slip right under it.
It hits you in the side of the face, knocking you silly and leaving a blush of tingly chemicals on your [pc.skinFurScales].
You easily jump over it.
It lashes your [pc.leg], leaving a swipe of enzyme and taking your support from under you! With a thud, you hit the ground.
It lashes your [pc.leg], leaving a swipe of enzyme, but you manage to stay upright.
You block her clumsy kick!
Her kick connects with you!
You cover your eyes, blocking the shower of dirt she threw.
Your faceguard protects your eyes.
Your goggles protect your eyes.
A shower of dirt hits your face,
to little effect.
blinding you!
You step back just as quickly, and she stumbles instead of latching onto you.

Before you can step back, she’s crawled "+({var0}?"through":"around")+" your [pc.legs] and up your back, exploring you with her fuzzy, aphrodisiac-spreading antennae. She goes right over the top, descending your front and treating you to an up-close view of her "+({var2}.lust({var2})?"wet, sex-ready":"cute orange")+" pussy before dismounting.

She goes right over the top, descending your front and treating you to an up-close view of her "+(this.lust()>=.66*this.lustMax()?"wet, sex-ready":"cute orange")+" pussy before dismounting.")

original: You ignore the distraction and pull your [pc.leg] away from the tail she’s trying to hook it with.
Her coy smile distracts you from the tail that caresses your [pc.leg] and then yanks it from under you!
You’re going to have a difficult time fighting from down here!
Even though you manage to keep her away from your sensitive areas, the sydian’s surface still leaves a dose of sex behind.
The tickly brushes and questing fingers are too numerous to stop, and your blood simmers as she searches out your most secret spots.
good thing your [pc.armor] is air tight!
you had better beware her touch now!
